focus: BUDDY/ELPH derivation + task scaffold buddy.edit.py vs arXiv:2209.15486 and github.com/melifluos/subgraph-sketching
findings: Core aggregators verified faithful: MinHash union=elementwise min, HLL union=elementwise max, |S∩T|=Jaccard·|S∪T|, A[1,1]=common neighbors, Hadamard edge pooling, MLP readout. Task scaffold buddy.edit.py CN and RA exact and sparse intersection adj[src].multiply(adj[dst]) correct; AA uses np.log(deg).clip(min=1.0) (deliberate harness log-clip for numerical safety, approximating exact 1/log deg). Illustrative ElphHashes inclusion-exclusion / boundary-count arithmetic in answer.md is simplified (one-sided B[d], cumulative rather than strict two-sided IE) vs canonical k(k+2) two-sided counts — illustrative pseudo-impl, conceptually correct.
scaffold_code_status: runs end-to-end, finite forward/backward, interface matches harness contract
